name: YouTube Transcript

composio_registry_match.name: YouTube
composio_registry_match.description: YouTube is a video-sharing platform with user-generated content, live streaming, and monetization opportunities, widely used for marketing, education, and entertainment

description: A REST API and MCP-compatible service that provides access to YouTube transcripts, channel video lists, search functionality, and playlist extraction.
notes: While Composio lists OAuth2, the docs prominently feature API key usage for integration; the service is highly compatible with LLM agent workflows via MCP.
